name: -f
--files
options.description: Will print out statistics on individual files

name: -l
--languages
options.description: Prints out supported languages and their extensions

options.name: --no-ignore-dot
options.description: Don't respect .ignore and .tokeignore files, including those in parent directories

options.name: --no-ignore-parent
options.description: Don't respect ignore files (.gitignore, .ignore, etc.) in parent directories

options.name: --no-ignore-vcs
options.description: Don't respect VCS ignore files (.gitignore, .hgignore, etc.), including those in parent directories

name: -c
--columns
options.description: Sets a strict column width of the output, only available for terminal output

name: -e
--exclude
options.description: Ignore all files & directories matching the pattern

name: -i
--input
options.description: Gives statistics from a previous tokei run. Can be given a file path, or "stdin" to read from stdin

name: -o
--output
options.description: Outputs Tokei in a specific format

name: -t
--type
options.description: Filters output by language type, seperated by a comma. i.e. -t=Rust,Markdown
